# 'gs branch diff --branch' targets a specific branch.

as 'Test <test@example.com>'
at '2024-03-30T14:59:32Z'

# setup
mkdir repo
cd repo
git init
git add init.txt
git commit -m 'Initial commit'
gs repo init

# create a feature branch with changes
cp $WORK/extra/feature.txt feature.txt
git add feature.txt
gs bc feature -m 'Add feature'

# go back to main
gs down

# diff targeting feature branch from main
gs branch diff --branch feature
stdout '\+feature contents'

-- repo/init.txt --
initial contents

-- extra/feature.txt --
feature contents
